div.div: Agent Council Patterns — Domain Councils & Workflow Sequence

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(41, 41, 41), rgb(202, 202, 202)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(223, 223, 223));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 73px; margin-left: 316px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
META-COUNCIL
Arbitrates cross-domain conflicts · Final escalation before human

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 243px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ARCHITECTURE COUNCIL
Domain: System design · ADRs
Technology selection · Refactoring
Decides: Architecture within spec
Technology within approved stack
Design patterns and trade-offs
Escalates: Greenfield architecture
Tech outside approved stack
Design with major security/compliance exposure

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 215px; margin-left: 351px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SECURITY COUNCIL
Domain: Threat assessment
Vulnerability · Access control
Security control enforcement
Decides: Controls within security spec
Vulnerability remediation < risk threshold
Escalates: Novel threat vectors
Risk above defined threshold
Conflicts with architecture exposure

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 351px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
COMPLIANCE COUNCIL
Domain: Regulatory requirements
Policy adherence · Data governance
Audit trail completeness
Decides: Policy application · Data classification
Standard regulatory interpretation
Escalates: Novel regulatory reading
Cross-jurisdictional conflicts
Policy gaps

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 320px; margin-left: 751px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
DEPLOYMENT COUNCIL
Domain: Release risk · Rollout strategy
Rollback planning · Operational impact
Decides: Deploy strategy within risk spec
Canary % · Rollback triggers
Escalates: Risk above threshold
Novel failure modes
Deployment blocks from Sec/Comp

div.div: Stage 3: Architecture Council only; Security + Compliance human-led · Stage 4: All four councils fully constituted; Meta-Council established · Stage 5: Harness assembles councils from registry per task · Stage 6: Councils become environment stewards
